text.title: Async Standup Methodology Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Team distributed across ≥2 timezones AND ≥2 daily contributors?

branch.question: Does a shared channel exist with admin write-access?
